name: Paystack Client Boundary
primary_area: Payments / Paystack / Provider boundary / Security / Tests

red_requires_failure_when: Paystack config accepts missing production secret
Secrets or authorization headers appear in inspect/log output
Client does not add Authorization internally
Provider HTTP/network errors leak raw exceptions
Transaction initializer loads or mutates Sales resources
Transaction verifier mutates PaymentAttempt or Order state
Webhook verifier accepts signatures over re-encoded JSON instead of raw body
Webhook verifier persists events or enqueues workers
Any Ash resource action calls Paystack modules
Webhook controller/route/worker is added in this slice
green_requires: Central Paystack config validates and redacts secrets
Client uses configured base URL, authorization header, JSON, and timeout
Initializer and verifier return normalized results without Sales workflow mutation
Webhook verifier validates raw-body signatures only and does not persist/enqueue
Sensitive fields are redacted from logs and errors
Boundary tests prove no Sales/Ash/payment workflow activation
Existing Sales checkout and scanner tests still pass

security_impact: Introduces payment-provider boundary and secret handling; requires strict runtime config and log redaction.
performance_impact: Adds bounded external HTTP client functions with explicit timeouts; no hot-path checkout or DB transaction integration yet.

missing_dependency_resolution_required.reason: The uploaded feature-pack set does not include a VS-21A pack, but VS-06A depends on its observability/log-redaction baseline.
accepted_resolutions: Import and accept a VS-21A Observability Naming and Log Redaction Foundation feature pack.
Document and accept an equivalent repo logging, telemetry, correlation-id, and redaction baseline before implementation.

implementation_gate: VS-06A may not be implemented until VS-21A or an equivalent logging/redaction baseline is accepted.
